title: Argentinian Grilled Steak with Radish Salad
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the charred taste of grilled steak with a crunchy radish salad.
instructions: Season steak with salt and pepper.
Grill steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 135°F (57°C) for medium-rare.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Combine sliced radishes, mixed greens, and crumbled cheese (if using) in a bowl.
Serve the radish salad alongside the grilled steak.
Optional: add a drizzle of olive oil and a squeeze of lemon juice to the salad.
